void
wpe_screen_sync_observer_remove_callback (
  WPEScreenSyncObserver* observer,
  guint id
)

Description [src]

Remove a callback previously added with wpe_screen_sync_observer_add_callback().

Parameters

id

Type: guint

An identifier returned by wpe_screen_sync_observer_add_callback()
